---
title: "Data Inspection: lv, na, check_system"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data Inspection: lv, na, check_system}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

## `lv()` — Variable Summary

`lv()` provides a quick overview of variables in a data frame (or Seurat object).

```{r lv-basic}
library(UtilsR)

# All variables
lv(iris)
```

```{r lv-select}
# Select specific variables
lv(iris, Species, Sepal.Length)
```

```{r lv-pattern}
# Regex pattern matching
lv(iris, pattern = "Sepal")
```

```{r lv-group}
# Grouped summary
lv(iris, Sepal.Length, group = "Species")
```

---

## `na()` — Missing Value Analysis

```{r na}
# Create data with NAs
df <- data.frame(
  x = c(1, NA, 3, NA, 5),
  y = c("a", "b", NA, "d", "e"),
  z = 1:5
)
check_na(df)
```

---

## `check_system()` — System Diagnostics

```{r check-system, eval=FALSE}
check_system()
```

Reports OS, R version, memory, CPU info, and loaded packages.

## `check_size()` — Object Memory Profiling

```{r check-size, eval=FALSE}
check_size()
```

Shows memory usage of all objects in the current environment.
